justification: The diff upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, correctly migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it removes @SpringBootApplication and @Profile annotations from HivereaderApplication.java without replacement, potentially breaking application startup. It also adds both JUnit 4 and JUnit 5 dependencies while excluding JUnit from spring-boot-starter-test, which is inconsistent. The removal of spring-boot-starter-jdbc is unexplained and may break functionality.
